description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular grassy plot, surrounded by several tall palm trees. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a paved path, flanked by two white sculptures and large floor-to-ceiling windows. The structure is characterized by clean lines, flat roofs, and a mix of white and dark gray exterior walls, with blue accent panels visible near the entrance and side. The rear and side elevations show a more private aspect, with fewer windows and a solid, minimalist design. The roof includes skylights and open sections, suggesting a focus on natural light and indoor-outdoor living. The landscaping is simple, with evenly spaced palm trees providing shade and visual interest.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, and blue accent panels, surrounded by palm trees on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, blue accent panels, sculptures, and a paved path flanked by palm trees.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid dark gray wall, minimal windows, and palm trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a more private facade with grouped windows and blue accents, surrounded by palm trees.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the flat roof, a mix of white and dark gray walls, and palm trees along the edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and grouped side windows
